lore.english:
Taimanin, student of Gosha Academy. Although still a student, she is frequently on missions, and she is expected to be the leading force of the new generation. On mission, she often works with her senior Akiyama Rinko. She earned the nickname "Lightning Taimanin" for defeating her enemies with lightning bullets unleashed through ninjutsu.

She is almost perfect, except for her temper and pride, but very few know that she is in fact quite shy. She is mutually intimate with Akiyama Tatsurou, her childhood friend and Rinko's younger brother, but the two have little progress in romance. 

A user of the ninja art, [FFFF00FF]Lightning Art[-]. It is said to be the most powerful among offensive ninja arts. In particular, Yukikaze is so overwhelmingly strong that she requires her twin-pistol limiters, the "Lightning Shooters", to keep it under control.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Lightning Gunfire[-]
skills.description:
Alternately fires dual pistols at the enemy, then fires one powerful shot, attacking 3 times.
On [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionLast], reduces the [&Common_Word_Skill_CoolTime] of [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_703] by [V2:70103] turn(s) at a fixed [&Color_Cyan][R:70103]%[-] chance.
skills.description_readable:
Alternately fires dual pistols at the enemy, then fires one powerful shot, attacking 3 times.
On [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionLast], reduces the [&Common_Word_Skill_CoolTime] of [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_703] by [V2:70103] turn(s) at a fixed [R:70103]% chance.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Lightning Art: Heavy Lightning[-]
skills.description:
Attacks a designated enemy with nimble movements and additionally fires at 1 [&Common_Word_Skill_Random] enemy.
Afterwards, jumps into the air and drops a powerful lightning bolt on [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll].
When the character kills a target with this skill, the [&Common_Word_Skill_CoolTime] of [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_702] is reset.
skills.description_readable:
Attacks a designated enemy with nimble movements and additionally fires at 1 [&Common_Word_Skill_Random] enemy.

When the character kills a target with this skill, the [&Common_Word_Skill_CoolTime] of [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_702] is reset.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Linear Thunder[-]
skills.description:
Jumps into the air and sprays bullets at [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll].
Reduces the [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] of the target hit by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:70302]%)[-] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:70302]%[-] chance.
If the target's [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] is at [&Color_Cyan]0%[-] [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionAfter], inflicts [&ElecShock] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:70303]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:70303] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Lightning Taimanin[-]
skills.description: When killing an enemy, [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] fills by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:70401]%)[-] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:70401]%[-] chance.
